prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words.

A strikingly handsome young man in his late twenties with an almost unnervingly perfect facial structure — high sharp cheekbones, a strong angular jawline, deep-set intense pale grey eyes with faint cybernetic micro-reflections in the iris, thick dark eyebrows with a slight natural arch, a straight aquiline nose, full but firm lips pressed into a cold detached expression. His skin is pale with a cool undertone, slightly weathered with faint micro-scarring along the left temple suggesting past violence or augmentation. His expression is stoic, distant, carrying the weight of existential fatigue — eyes that have witnessed both love and death and emerged hollow.

Hair: jet black, medium-length, slicked back with a few damp strands falling across his forehead, slightly disheveled as if caught in perpetual rain, with an undercut fade on the sides revealing subtle dermal interface ports behind the left ear.

Build: tall, powerfully athletic, broad-shouldered with a lean muscular frame — visibly strong, the physique of someone built for survival and endurance, with thick forearms and large hands bearing scarred knuckles.

Clothing: a long dark charcoal tactical trench coat with a high mandarin collar, matte black finish with subtle worn edges and micro-abrasions on the shoulders and elbows, interior lined with faintly glowing amber-orange circuit-thread stitching barely visible at the seams. Underneath, a fitted slate-grey compression shirt with a subtle ribbed texture clinging to his muscular torso. Dark black utility cargo pants with reinforced knee panels and matte gunmetal buckle straps at the thighs. Heavy-duty black combat boots with thick treaded soles, scuffed and battle-worn. A thin black leather belt with a minimalist brushed-steel buckle. Around his left wrist, a cracked holographic interface band emitting a faint neon blue glow. Around his neck, a thin black cord holding a small tarnished metallic pendant — ambiguous, possibly a memento tied to love or loss.

Overall aesthetic: retrofuturistic cyberpunk dystopian survivor, Blade Runner 2049 inspired silhouette, desaturated cold tonal palette with muted charcoal-black-grey clothing punctuated by subtle neon blue and burnt orange accent details. The character radiates dangerous charisma and quiet intensity — beautiful yet broken, physically imposing yet emotionally isolated. Anti-utopian melancholy permeates every detail, from the worn fabric textures to the hollow thousand-yard stare. The design evokes themes of love, death, and machines — a man caught between humanity and the mechanical, fate and free will.

4K ultra-high definition, maximum clarity and detail, photorealistic rendering with film grain texture, cinematic lighting with cool blue-grey ambient tones., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: cyberpunk
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
